commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=caeb344bdecf01c33456ca1cc585e81d8aec912a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds reset-archive fallback resolution for gateway session transcript reads, updates session-history tests, and adds a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +54, Tests +106, Docs +1. Total +161 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: reset archives are valid sibling artifacts, while current main's transcript readers return empty when `findExistingTranscriptPath` cannot find an active transcript. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the archive ordering bug, add the missing regression, and remove the changelog hunk without needing a product decision.

target.title: fix(sessions): fall back to reset archive for missing async transcripts
target.body:
Repair path for #76134.

Summary:
- Carry forward @masatohoshino's focused gateway async fallback so chat.history and sessions-history HTTP can read the latest matching .jsonl.reset archive when the active transcript is missing.
- Keep the patch narrow to the transcript resolution helper, async readers/counts, focused tests, and changelog.
- Preserve context from #45003 and the closed prior attempt #60409 without broadening into the larger includeArchived/product API work in #73883.

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run src/gateway/session-utils.fs.test.ts src/gateway/sessions-history-http.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review must pass cleanly before merge.

Clownfish 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: gitcrawl-10447-autonomous-smoke
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/76134, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/60409
- Credit: Repair source PR: #76134 by @masatohoshino. Preserve that authorship and thank the contributor in the PR body/changelog note.; Historical prior art: #60409 by @CadanHu and canonical issue #45003 by @CadanHu describe the same gateway reset-archive recovery gap; mention them as context when relevant.
- Validation: pnpm -s vitest run src/gateway/session-utils.fs.test.ts src/gateway/sessions-history-http.test.ts; pnpm check:changed
- Repair fallback: source PR #76134 is a fork branch requiring rebase; use replacement branch because GitHub App pushes to contributor forks can be rejected when rebased upstream history includes workflow files

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning xhigh; reviewed against caeb344bdecf.
